summary: Start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 after M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-RECOVERY-001 closed in origin/main through PR #224. The task must implement authoritative topology definitions and read/query boundaries per ADR-010 before fixture, client, and validation tasks proceed.

decisions.decision: Start schema only after topology recovery closure entered origin/main.
Do not start M7 exit or approve content lock during schema work.

risks.summary: The task touches topology, protocol, content-runtime, and save boundaries.
risks.mitigation: Owner is systems_architect; QA acceptance required before integration.

requested_action: Implement M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 within allowed paths and return a REVIEW handoff to qa_reviewer.
